---
name: Feature request
about: An idea for a new capability or UX improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What you want to do:**
<!-- The end-state, in 1–2 sentences. e.g. "Be able to bulk-rename assets" -->

**Why it would help:**
<!-- The pain point this addresses. What's the current workaround (if any)? -->

**Which area:**
<!-- e.g. Map Styler, hotkeys, validator, panel UI, brand-new feature -->

**Rough sketch / mockup (optional):**
<!-- Drag in a screenshot, describe the flow, etc. -->

**Priority for you:**
- [ ] Blocking — can't do my job efficiently without it
- [ ] Painful but workable
- [ ] Nice to have
